name: Marinated Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Italian vinegar and oil dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the tomatoes and add them to a bowl.
2. Alternate adding the onions and green pepper ringlets with the tomatoes.
3. Mix all dressings, sugar, and water in a separate container.
4. Pour the mixture over the tomatoes, ensuring they are fully coated.
5. Mix everything together well.
6. Place the green pepper ringlets on top of the mixture.
7. Marinate overnight.
8. At the end, season with salt and pepper. (You can continue using the mixture by adding fresh tomatoes.)
